projects.title: baidu / ERNIE-Image
projects.description: ERNIE-Image is an open text-to-image generation model developed by the ERNIE-Image team at Baidu. It is built on a single-stream Diffusion Transformer (DiT), with only 8B DiT parameters, it reaches state-of-the-art performance among open-weight text-to-image models.
